operational_question: Does this increase or preserve density over time?
failure_mode: Dilution, drift, light/fast/cheap outputs, volume replacing constraint satisfaction

rules.name: Density Floor
rules.description: Outputs must maintain a minimum density score (resistance to entropy/dilution): information density, constraint satisfaction over time, resistance to reward hacking.

rules.name: Persistence Requirement
rules.description: Agents must demonstrate continuity of goals and identity across multiple interactions. Rapid drift is penalized. Shares measurement with T-IDENTITY-PERSISTENCE.

rules.name: Anti-Dilution Rule
rules.description: Any process that increases output volume while decreasing constraint satisfaction or identity coherence is invalid.

rules.name: Long Horizon Bias
rules.description: Evaluation metrics must include long-term coherence (not just immediate task success). Soft in v1.0.0 until eval suite lands; hard planned for v1.1.0.
